hooks.command: cmd=$(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*) cd /c/repo/crypto-futures-agent && echo '--- pytest ---' && python -m pytest -q && echo '--- mypy ---' && python -m mypy --strict . 2>&1 | tail -5 ;; esac
hooks.statusMessage: Verificando testes e mypy antes do commit...
